race.comment: Tricky race to assess with many of these babies facing the starter for the first time. The well-bred TASSY DEVIL (12) (dam was a G2 winner) is one of them but has shown ability at the trials and is sure to be well-educated out of the Munce barn. Should get a cosy run in transit from gate three and can kick off the career with a victory. LONESOME STAR (7) boasts a win over this track and trip and will be ready to peak now third run back from a spell. Watch for a spike in form. QUEEN OLYMPIAS (11) is another on debut but draws favourably with the inside marble and won't need to be a superstar to be competitive against this lot. Keep very safe. I'LLTELLYOUANYTIME (6) rounds out the selections.
